The plant is also known by its alternative name, 'summer cypress'.

intro: Kochia brachyptera, also known as Mexican Fireweed or Burnweed, is a flowering plant in the amaranth family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
